emails.subject: Homework #3 Extension
emails.body:
Hi Karthik,

I wanted to reach out to ask if I could have an extension on Homework #3 - I have been feeling sick this weekend and would sincerely appreciate the extra time.

Thanks,
Ari
emails.snippet: I wanted to reach out to ask if I could have an extension on Homework #3

emails.subject: Religious observance and HW5 deadline
emails.body:
Hi Karthik,

Due to a religious holiday, I won't be able to work from Friday sundown to Saturday night. Could I submit HW5 on Sunday without penalty? Happy to provide documentation if needed.

Best,
Vince
emails.snippet: Due to a religious holiday, I won't be able to work from Friday sundown to Saturday night

emails.subject: Extension request for Project 1 (recruiting)
emails.body:
Hi Karthik,

I have three onsite interviews next week and I'm worried about meeting the project deadline. Would a 48-hour extension be possible? If not, could I use two late days on the project?
Thank you,

Turtle
emails.snippet: I have three onsite interviews next week and I'm worried about meeting the project deadline

emails.subject: Post Operation Check-In
emails.body:
Hi Karthik,

I just wanted to check in to see how your symptoms were. Please schedule an appointment with me later this week for us to chat.

Best,
Dr. Metz
emails.snippet: I just wanted to check in to see how your symptoms were
